name: NOVOLIPETSKIY MET.KO.REGS
summary: NOVOLIPETSKIY MET.KO.REGS is a vertically integrated steel producer, manufacturing a wide range of steel products, including flat steel, long steel, and semi-finished products. The company operates primarily in Russia and serves various industries, including construction, automotive, and engineering. The company is headquartered in Lipetsk, Russia.
